# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

No actionable correctness, safety, or robustness findings in the reviewed branch state. I reviewed the changed source files and validated with nix develop -c cargo fmt --check, nix develop -c cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings, nix develop -c cargo test --locked, and nix build.

## Amendments

None.
